title: Damn the Defiant!
writer: Nigel Kneale, Edmund H. North, Frank Tilsley
actors: Alec Guinness, Dirk Bogarde, Maurice Denham
plot: On the H.M.S. Defiant, during the French Revolutionary War, fair Captain Crawford is locked in a battle of wills against his cruel second-in-command Lieutenant Scott-Padget, whose heavy-handed command style pushes the crew to mutiny.
